# RokdBot - Rise of Kingdoms Bot Farm Service

## About
RokdBot is a cloud-hosted bot farm service for Rise of Kingdoms (RoK). We run bots on our servers for customers — no software download required. Customers choose a package, pay via VietQR (Vietnam) or PayPal (international), and our team sets up the bot within 24 hours.

## Services
- Auto gather resources (food, wood, stone, gold) 24/7
- Auto gather gems (home kingdom + KvK map)
- Auto train & heal troops
- Auto upgrade buildings
- Auto collect rewards & alliance gifts
- Auto kill barbarians
- Auto join alliance events
- Custom farm strategies per request
- Anti-detection safe mode
- Multi-account support (premium plans)
- Auto captcha solving (premium plans)

## Pricing (VND / USD)
- Trial Package: 150,000 VND (~$6 USD) / 7 days — new customers only
- Basic Package: 750,000 VND (~$30 USD) / 30 days — 1 account
- Premium Package: 900,000 VND (~$36 USD) / 30 days — custom strategy
- Ultimate Package: 1,200,000 VND (~$48 USD) / 30 days — multi-account + VIP

## Payment Methods
- VietQR (instant bank transfer via QR code) — Vietnam customers
- PayPal — international customers

## How It Works
1. Choose a package on rokdbot.com
2. Pay via VietQR or PayPal
3. Contact us on Discord or Zalo with your order code + game account info
4. Bot is set up and running within 24 hours

## Contact
- Website: https://rokdbot.com
- Discord: https://discord.gg/UPuFYCw4JG
- Zalo: https://zalo.me/g/rqgqyd878

## Technical
- Frontend: React + TypeScript + Vite + Tailwind CSS
- Backend: Supabase (PostgreSQL + Edge Functions)
- Payment: SePay webhook + VietQR API + PayPal
- Hosting: Vercel
